libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set the Netty/Java 25 native runtime properties before Vert.x/Netty initialization: `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`. If Gradle runtime args are not changed by the workflow, generated tests should set these system properties at the very start of the test class before creating `Vertx` or `WebClient` instances.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 5.0.0 scaffold only applies these runtime args when `libraryVersion == '5.0.0'`, so running the same tests with `GVM_TCK_LV=5.0.1` can omit the required properties.
OAuth2-specific APIs reference the optional `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2` module, but core WebClient coverage does not require adding it.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 is usable with an in-process Vert.x HTTP server and needs no Docker image or extra Maven dependency for meaningful core coverage, but it still pulls Netty 4.2.x and native-image runs on Java 25 need the same Netty unsafe/reflection system properties already used for 5.0.0.
